content:
Hi, I wanted to ask whether anyone would be interested in developing abstractions for mac80211. (Yes, I'm aware of the scale of that task).
I develop an open source WLAN stack for the ESP32 in rust, and thought it would be pretty cool, to be able to use the ESP32 as a normal Wi-Fi card, with an open source firmware.
I've not yet written a driver for mac80211 or even any kernel module at all, so I don't feel competent enough to take the lead on developing such abstractions, but if there's interest in it, I might be able to provide some help.
Greetings
Simon Neuenhausen
I think the main use of this could be having a driver, that implements as many features of mac80211 as possible, since we can just add features we want into the firmware
